compiled_state.title: [ccc3-954a] GREEN: Implement migrate-markdown-refs.py with runtime/prose classification
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## What to do
Implement plugins/dso/scripts/migrate-markdown-refs.py — migrates plugins/dso references in markdown files.

## Classification logic

### Runtime context → convert to ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/path
A line is runtime context if ANY of:
- Currently inside a fenced code block (```bash, ```shell, ```)
- Line contains Read(, Glob(, Grep(, Bash( followed by a plugins/dso path
- Line starts with cat, source, bash, sh (shell invocation in prose)
- Line contains ".claude/scripts/dso" (shim invocation context)

### Prose context → strip plugins/dso/ prefix
A line is prose context if:
- NOT runtime context
- Reference appears in backtick (inline code) as a descriptive path

### Excluded lines (skip entirely, no modification)
- Lines containing # shim-exempt:
- Lines containing # plugin-self-ref-ok:
- Lines containing # portability-ok:

## Transformation rules
- runtime: `plugins/dso/foo/bar` → `${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/foo/bar`
- prose:   `plugins/dso/foo/bar` → `foo/bar`  (strip plugins/dso/ prefix)

## CLI interface
python3 migrate-markdown-refs.py [--dry-run] [--verbose] [--runtime-only] <target_dir>
--runtime-only: Only convert runtime refs; skip prose stripping (safer first pass)

## Files to create
- plugins/dso/scripts/migrate-markdown-refs.py

## testing_mode: GREEN
